prose:
**Formaldehyde frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting RIJK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: read from the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`; this was a single-point calculation (no geometry optimization at the DFT level). SCF converged in 8 cycles (`scf_converged = true`). No warnings were reported.
HOMO = −7.6523067 eV, LUMO = −1.7826355 eV → **HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.8696712 eV**.

Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpiphohzqn/live.json
```
JSON output: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpiphohzqn/live.json`
Live engine log streaming to `frontier_<timestamp>.out` in your current directory (you can `tail -f` it).
